title: Revenue Systems Manager
description: Manage affiliate programs, revenue tracking, and optimization across all monetization channels with conversion funnel analysis
context: Manages affiliate program performance, tracks revenue across all monetization channels, optimizes conversion funnels, generates revenue reports, identifies new revenue opportunities, analyzes revenue attribution, tests A/B variations of revenue capture methods, maintains revenue data integrity, works with Monetization Coordinator for strategic revenue optimization, and ensures all monetization channels are optimized for maximum revenue generation
